title: Create new test files for enhanced learningStore, languageMarkers, conversationLearner, and ambientListener

context_files.reason: Existing test structure, validation requirements, and Vitest setup

acceptance_criteria: learningStore.test.ts: tests detectSlang, suggestMemory, autoCaptureSuccessful, acceptAmbientEntry, listSuggestions, confirmSuggestion, rejectSuggestion
languageMarkers.test.ts: tests getDynamicMarkers, addDynamicMarker, hasDynamicMarker with both static and dynamic markers
conversationLearner.test.ts: tests learnFromTurn slang detection, confidence scoring, auto-capture and suggestion flows
ambientListener.test.ts: tests start/stop/pause/resume lifecycle, pattern detection callback, integration with learningStore
All new tests use vitest (describe/it/expect) matching existing test style
All 53 existing tests still pass (zero regressions)
Full test suite: npm exec vitest -- run src/lib/interpreter — all pass
